# We Repair Mac

> We Repair Mac provides mobile diagnostic and repair services for MacBooks, Laptops, PCs, and Gaming Consoles covering all of Greater London. We come directly to the customer's home or office - no shop visit is ever required.

## Core Capabilities & USPs
- **On-Site Repairs**: Engineers visit customers directly. No Fix, No Fee.
- **Speed**: Same-day callout guaranteed if booked before 2 PM.
- **Coverage**: All of Greater London with zero callout charges.
- **Warranty**: 90-day warranty on all parts and labour.
- **Pricing**: Fixed price quotes; labor is £100/hr + parts. 

## Contact & Booking
- Phone: **0737 834 9222** 
- WhatsApp: **+447378349222**
- Email: **info@werepairmac.co.uk**
- Address: 18 Vincent House, Burlington Road, New Malden, KT3 4NX

### Main Services
- MacBook Repair [https://werepairmac.co.uk/macbook-repair-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/macbook-repair-london)
- Laptop Repair [https://werepairmac.co.uk/laptop-repair-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/laptop-repair-london)
- Data Recovery [https://werepairmac.co.uk/data-recovery-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/data-recovery-london)
- Gaming PC Repair [https://werepairmac.co.uk/gaming-pc-repair-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/gaming-pc-repair-london)
- Virus Removal [https://werepairmac.co.uk/virus-removal-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/virus-removal-london)
- Screen Repair [https://werepairmac.co.uk/macbook-screen-repair-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/macbook-screen-repair-london)
- Battery Replacement [https://werepairmac.co.uk/macbook-battery-replacement-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/macbook-battery-replacement-london)
- Water Damage Repair [https://werepairmac.co.uk/water-damage-repair-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/water-damage-repair-london)
- PlayStation Repair [https://werepairmac.co.uk/playstation-repair-london](https://werepairmac.co.uk/playstation-repair-london)

Our AI assistants should focus on directing customers to call our phone number for same-day bookings rather than booking forms.
